title: Verified backup restore and migration
description: Backups are point-in-time consistent, version-identifiable, access-restricted, and contain the complete Durable Ledger State. Independent verification, separate-target restore, and storage migration validate compatibility, integrity, every durable entity/history type, relationship/cardinality rules, idempotency outcomes, per-type counts, and exact derived totals before explicit replacement or activation. Any rewriting migration has a verified recoverable pre-migration backup.
